ambiguities.input_contextualized_conventional_defaul: 3-month payment plan is short-term (≤3 months), resolved at face value within normal credit terms per IFRS rules.
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: Short-term payment plans (3 months or less) resolve at face value - no present value discounting required.

ambiguities.aspect: Asset classification - vehicle for executive use
ambiguities.input_contextualized_conventional_defaul: Vehicle purchased for business use is classified as PP&E (Motor Vehicles) - stated purpose is 'commuting and business use' for an executive.
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: IAS 16 requires capitalization of assets held for use in operations - vehicle qualifies as PP&E.

ambiguities.input_contextualized_conventional_defaul: Text explicitly states '10% non-recoverable sales tax' - non-recoverable taxes are capitalized into the asset cost per stated facts.
ambiguities.input_contextualized_ifrs_default: IAS 16.16(a) includes non-refundable purchase taxes in the cost of PP&E.

best_attempt.reason: Vehicle cost $48,000 plus non-recoverable sales tax $4,800 equals total capitalized cost of $52,800, financed through short-term dealer payment plan recorded as accounts payable.
